response.step_by_step_log:
Identified two distinct musical performances.
Song 1: "Dramatic XViltration" by Hololive Indonesia 1st Generation. Performed by Moona Hoshinova, Ayunda Risu, and Airani Iofifteen. Used search query: "Dramatic XViltration" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics.
Song 2: "青春アーカイブ" by Hololive IDOL PROJECT (composed by HoneyWorks). Performed by Tsunomaki Watame and Tokoyami Towa. Used search query: "青春アーカイブ" HoneyWorks Japanese and English lyrics.
The lyrics for both songs were retrieved and verified.
response.global_summary: The video is a compilation of two live musical performances featuring Hololive VTubers. The first performance is "Dramatic XViltration" by Hololive Indonesia 1st Generation (Moona Hoshinova, Ayunda Risu, Airani Iofifteen). The second is "青春アーカイブ" (Seishun Archive) by Tsunomaki Watame and Tokoyami Towa.

scenes.description: Hololive Indonesia 1st Generation (Moona Hoshinova, Ayunda Risu, Airani Iofifteen) perform "Dramatic XViltration".
scenes.performer_in_video: Moona Hoshinova, Ayunda Risu, Airani Iofifteen
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目を覚ませ
身を起こして
夢から抜け出して
世界が目撃する
我らの蘇り
鏡に映る
心に宿っている
小さいヒカリ
そう、今も感じる
何処かこの奥で
呼び覚ました
忘れられない
浮かぶメモリー
今の自分になる
その前に
果てのない
迷路で迷い
そして黄昏が
落ちてくる
何処までも
引き締める
クサリが鳴らす
体温を止めてた
ためらいを
覚えてしまって
凍えていくの
足の向こう側に
道なるエリア
その境界線の
先に待つのは
イチゴの始め
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Open your eyes
Wake up
Escape from the dream
The world will witness
Our resurrection
Reflecting in the mirror
A small light
That dwells in the heart
Yes, I still feel it
Somewhere deep inside
Awakened
Unforgettable
Floating memories
Before becoming the self I am now
Lost in an endless maze
And the twilight
Is falling
Everywhere
The chain that tightens
Is ringing
Stopping the body temperature
Hesitation
I've learned it
And I'm freezing
Beyond the feet
An unknown area
Waiting beyond that boundary line
The beginning of 15

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame and Tokoyami Towa perform "青春アーカイブ" (Seishun Archive).

終わらない
青春に
Woah-woah-woah-oh-oh
Woah-woah-woah-oh-oh
Woah, woah Ooh
Boys and girls
羞恥心は捨てて
Hey, jump!
みんなで揃えば

Jump!
